title: IEEE 802.11ah (Wi-Fi HaLow) Protocol Stack and Key Features
description: A layered diagram showing the position of 802.11ah within the IEEE 802.11 family and its key enabling features for IoT.
relationships: 802.11ah is a sub-standard of the IEEE 802.11 family
802.11ah operates in the Sub-1 GHz band to achieve greater range and wall penetration
IoT End Devices connect to an Access Point using the low-power 802.11ah protocol
The combination of Sub-1 GHz and protocol optimizations enables Extended Range and Low Power Consumption
